title: CFTR / elexacaftor / tezacaftor / ivacaftor
summary: Patients with the rs1800076 AA genotype (two copies of the CFTR R75Q variant) and cystic fibrosis may respond to ivacaftor or elexacaftor / tezacaftor / ivacaftor treatment. FDA-approved drug labeling information indicate use of ivacaftor or elexacaftor / tezacaftor / ivacaftor in cystic fibrosis patients with at least one copy of R75Q. Other genetic and clinical factors may also influence response to ivacaftor or elexacaftor / tezacaftor / ivacaftor.
